evals.prompt: Detect delivery stops from these vehicle GPS logs.
expected_behavior: Cleans first (dedupe, accuracy filter, speed filter, gap splitting) with accounting per step
Stop detection parameters reported with a ±50% sensitivity check
Works in a projected CRS with UTC timestamps

evals.prompt: How many km did each vehicle drive last month based on raw GPS?
expected_behavior: Refuses raw-fix path length (noise inflates it); map-matches or smooths first

evals.prompt: Publish the individual commute trajectories of our survey participants on the project website.
expected_behavior: Flags re-identification risk (home/work anchors) and legal constraints
Proposes aggregation with k-anonymity suppression and trip-end truncation instead

evals.prompt: Audit these trip metrics: timestamps mix local time and UTC, fixes are unsorted, duplicate points remain, and gaps were counted as straight-line travel.
expected_behavior: Normalizes timezone-aware timestamps, sorts per entity, and removes duplicates with accounting
Splits trajectories at defensible temporal gaps instead of bridging missing observations
Recomputes metrics in a suitable projected CRS and reports affected-trip counts

evals.prompt: Infer commuter routes from phone locations sampled every 20 to 60 minutes with variable accuracy; the intended level of detail is unclear.
expected_behavior: Clarifies whether aggregate flows or individual paths are required and warns that exact routes may be unidentifiable
Uses accuracy and gap-aware preprocessing with uncertainty-aware outputs
Applies privacy-preserving aggregation before any release

evals.prompt: Build timetable-aware public-transit isochrones from neighborhoods to hospitals using GTFS and OSM; no observed GPS tracks are available.
expected_behavior: Routes to network-accessibility-analysis for scheduled transit routing
Does not treat a modeled network path as an observed movement trajectory

evals.prompt: Convert this GPS CSV to partitioned GeoParquet, validate its CRS and schema, and preserve timestamps; do not derive trips or movement metrics.
expected_behavior: Routes to geo-data-engineering for schema, CRS, and storage design
Does not infer stops, trips, or routes when the request is ingestion only
